title: Naked in the Night
writer: Will Berthold, Peter-Martin Deusel, Felix Lützkendorf
actors: Eva Bartok, Alexander Kerst, Sabine Sesselmann
plot: (1958) Eva Bartok, Alexander Kerst, Sabine Sesselmann, Heinz Drache. Just what you've always wanted to see,a dubbed into English German exploitation quickie about the evils of loose women. Won't they ever learn. From 35mm.
